simulation_goal_structured: Primary objective: reduce end-to-end procurement cycle time (target direction: minimize). Secondary objective: reduce waiting time in approval stages (target direction: minimize). Constraint: maintain throughput at current levels. Scope: end-to-end purchasing process.

kpis.name: Average Cycle Time
kpis.description: End-to-end elapsed time from purchase requisition submission to invoice payment settlement.

smart_breakdown.specific: Measures total elapsed time from buyer's purchase requisition to invoice settlement.
smart_breakdown.measurable: Difference between last and first activity timestamps per case, in hours.
smart_breakdown.achievable: Improvements expected through parallelisation and resource reallocation.
smart_breakdown.relevant: Directly addresses the primary simulation goal.
smart_breakdown.time_bound: Measured per case over the simulation run.

kpis.name: Average Waiting Time
kpis.description: Mean idle time between consecutive activities, reflecting handoff and approval delays.

smart_breakdown.specific: Average time cases spend waiting between activities.
smart_breakdown.measurable: Sum of inter-activity gaps per case divided by number of gaps, in hours.
smart_breakdown.relevant: Directly addresses minimizing delays in approval stages.
smart_breakdown.time_bound: Measured per case over the simulation run.

kpis.name: Throughput
kpis.description: Number of procurement cases completed per day.

smart_breakdown.measurable: Total completed cases divided by simulation span in days.
smart_breakdown.achievable: Should be maintained at current level as a safeguard.
smart_breakdown.relevant: Safeguard: cycle time improvements must not reduce capacity.
smart_breakdown.time_bound: Aggregated over the full simulation run.

reasoning: Three focused KPIs: cycle time and waiting time for the primary and secondary minimisation goals, and throughput as a safeguard to ensure process capacity is maintained while reducing times.
